strategy: Use the retrieved end-of-third-quarter scoreboard frames directly and verify the final visible score/leader from the latest stable frame, avoiding redundant retrieval.

steps.purpose: Inspect the retrieved end-of-third-quarter scoreboard frame and determine the exact score and which team is leading, then map that result to the provided options.
